headline: 3 Wood Stocks Positioned to Thrive Through Industry Challenges
summary: More infrastructure spending, a focus on product innovation and efficient cost management are encouraging for the Zacks Building Products - Wood industry players like WY, TREX and WOR despite a challenging macroeconomic backdrop.
